add.description: Explicitly document default quantity=1 behavior in POST /cart/add endpoint specification.
add.reason: API contract mismatch between Story requirement and LLD implementation; frontend integration and API documentation may be incomplete.

add.requirement_reference: Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link)
add.description: Add explicit business rule documenting empty cart UI redirection requirement with 'continue shopping' link.
add.reason: Business rule not explicitly captured in LLD; UX implementation and test cases may miss required redirection behavior.

add.requirement_reference: Empty Cart View with Redirection Link
add.description: Add Empty Cart View component specification with redirection link behavior.
add.reason: Component specification gap; frontend implementation may miss dedicated empty cart component.

add.requirement_reference: Order Orchestration Engine (implicit in cart-to-checkout workflow)
add.description: Document integration contract with Order Orchestration Engine for checkout handoff.
add.reason: Integration boundary not clearly defined; checkout flow integration may have gaps.

modify.required_change: Align all endpoint paths with Story specification: use /api/v1/cart pattern with RESTful resource naming (/cart/items instead of /cart/add).
modify.reason: API versioning and path structure not aligned with Story specification; API contract breaking change and documentation inconsistency.

modify.current_state: CartItem entity includes productId, quantity, addedAt but no explicit price snapshot field.
modify.required_change: Include 'priceSnapshot' (Decimal) field capturing product price at time of cart addition.
modify.reason: Price consistency risk; cart may not preserve price at time of addition, leading to order history price discrepancies.

modify.current_state: Section 3.3 mentions recalculation but doesn't explicitly state 'upon any quantity mutation'.
modify.required_change: Explicitly state: 'Subtotal and total MUST be automatically recalculated upon ANY quantity mutation (add, update, remove operations)'.
modify.reason: Business rule not precisely specified; implementation may miss edge cases and test coverage gaps.

modify.required_change: Standardize component naming to 'Cart View Interface' instead of 'CartView'.
modify.reason: Minor naming inconsistency; component naming convention alignment needed.
